_comment: Ordered user classification rules for gogos.gmail.gmail_rules — checked FIRST, first match wins, override built-in rules. Each rule is {match, category}; match has exactly one of: domain (substring of sender domain), sender (substring of the From field), pattern (regex on the From field). category is one of Action / Review / Events / Information / Newsletters / Safe to Delete (a GSD/ prefix is accepted). Safety cap enforced in code: a rule can NEVER route financial/security/civic/real-person mail into Safe to Delete. Example: {"match": {"sender": "LinkedIn Jobs"}, "category": "Review"}
